caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie sits in a studio setting. He is looking down and interacting with a smartphone held in both hands. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. Behind him is a white wall featuring yellow stars and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated twice. A large red and blue sign reads "BOSS TALK 101" with the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!" written in a blue script above it. On the table to his left is a black box with a logo, and to his right is a blue and red mug that says "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, continuing to focus on his device with minimal movement, while the camera angle and scene composition remain constant.
